name: Milwaukee's Club 30th Anniversary — American Style Whiskey
description: American style whiskey distilled in 2006 (KY), finished in a Chichibu refill puncheon from 2012–2020. Bottled for Milwaukee's Club Whiskey Bar's 30th Anniversary. Bottle #1568. 700ml, 54.5% ABV. Held in Vellichor's insured, climate-controlled vault; this token represents a fractional Vault Unit claim on this specific physical bottle.
